scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.docker:rebuild: DOCKER_BUILDKIT=0 docker build -t ecashengine-backend-dev --target dev ./backend && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=0 docker build -t ecashengine-frontend-dev --target dev ./frontend && docker compose up -d --no-build
scripts.dev:docker: npm run setup:dev-env && docker compose up --build -d
